violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Dishwasher was observed not dispensing any sanitizer. PIC called to get unit serviced at the time of inspection. Establishment to use 3-bay sink until dishwasher is repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and fan covers in the walk in have an accumulation of biofilm and dust. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen and bar ware-washing area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

The following were observed in poor repair: 1) The floor tiles in the kitchen observed missing 2) The floor in the walk-in cooler observed with peeled epoxy paint. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023

The walls behind the 3 bay sink in the bar are constructed of walls that are not smooth, durable and easily cleanable. This material is not durable. Materials for wallsurfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
